description: Letter from Shelomo b. Yehuda to Yaʿaqov Ha-Meʿuttad b. Yosef. Dating: probably end of 1015. The content emphasizes the need of communal leaders and includes biblical citations from Ezra 7.28, Ezekiel 10.11, and Proverbs 16.20.
description_he: מכתב משלמה בן יהודה ליעקב המעותד בן יוסף, כנראה סוף 1015.
